creator: mitch911@free.fr
text:

Fix: 

In the Makefile:
#17                 --with-dbi-incdir=${LOCALBASE}/include/dbi

To fix:
#17                --with-dbi-incdir=${LOCALBASE}/include/
How-To-Repeat: root@WebBSD:/usr/ports/databases/libdbi-drivers# make install
